title: Fresh Animations Patch - More Mob Variants
description: A Fresh Animations patch pack that allows "More Mob Variants" to function with "Fresh Animations".
body:
Model and texture edit patch to make the mobs in [More Mob Variants](/mod/more-mob-variants) compatible with the latest [Fresh Animations](/resourcepack/fresh-animations) formatting.

The pack includes edits of the mod's mob textures as well as edits of Fresh Animations' models.

Optifine /or/ EntityModelTextures+EntityModelFeatures is required for the model to function. Make sure this pack is placed /above/ Fresh Animations.

Note: it does not yet have compatibility for temperature variant model changes, for those using a newer game version or vanilla backport mods, but that functionality is coming soon!
